script: Black Friday is HERE at Shopmart Global! 🔥 The biggest sale of the year — up to 50% OFF on thousands of products! Electronics, projectors, beauty devices, home decor, toys and much more. Don't miss out — these deals won't last! Use code BLACKFRIDAY50 for an extra 25% off your entire order. Shop now at shopmartglobal.net or shopmartglobal.store. Free shipping to Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar and worldwide. HURRY — limited time only!
